info.english_meaning: to drip to flow to ooze out

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'mahAvanamiva cCinnaM SiSye vigalitadrumam' (BA0 vi0 2332) vigalitAH patitA drumA yatra tat
'rativigalitabanDe keSapASe sukeSyAH' (vikrama0 raGu0 967 tatra priyAyA iti pAWaH)
'ratO niDuvane vigalitA viGawitA visrastA banDAH kabaryo yatra jalAtpunarvigalito (matsyo) galito vakena' (paYcata0 287) vigalito BrazWaH nizkrAnta iti yAvat galito nigilitaH avagIrRaH
'kAmAgnineva santaptaH svinno vigalitaH sa ca' (kaTA0 1878) ukto'rTaH
'dAkziRyodakavAhinI vigalitA' (mfcCa0) vigalitA niHSezeRa srutA syannA skannA SozaM gatetyarTaH
